notes: New: social buttons on the title screen - the Discord tile opens our community server, and the rest are coming soon. Please join us for discussion and community building! Tik Tok, Insta, and Website coming soon.
The Deep Death screen now quotes the true Yomi Tear range of the Tolls you are about to be offered, instead of a ceiling you'd rarely reach, making when to deep death decisions transparent and fair.
Death Shrine: the memory blessings that carry your jobs and skills into the next life are cheaper at almost every level - only the deepest step of Master's Memory was increased.

Temple Tasks: forging and upgrading equipment now only ever asks for a single piece, at every tear rank, and a gear task no longer appears when your forge has nothing left that it can make or improve.

The scaffolding and basic structure for a very, very advanced game system no one has even come close to touching yet has been implemented. Keep integrating and becoming one with Mizuchi's soul samurai...all rebirths help but deep death rebirths are more effective...
Fixed the skills list opening on blank space after a rebirth relocks Tactics and Spirituality.
Death Shrine: the Relive option now spells out that it replays the original main story. It's just a way to enjoy the main story again - there's no exploits. It's been exhaustively reviewed...
Tear ranks widened again at the deep end, so Temple Task difficulty climbs more gradually late on.
Temple Tasks: every job can now be rolled at every tear rank, so a reroll always has another job to offer.
The longest scribe jobs now ask for a single completion instead of up to two.
Tear ranks widened, so Temple Task difficulty climbs more gradually.
Job task counts rebalanced across every tear rank.
New: an update notes screen on the title - the page icon lists what changed in each version.
A big tablet layout pass: larger text and controls across the Death Shrine, Shop, Jobs, Missions, Kami, Town and Castle.
Death Shrine: clearer Shallow and Deep Death choices, with tear awards shown up front.
Buff banners wrap cleanly and use clear symbols for world states and the Yomi toll.
Mission tooltips now open in front of the mission you tapped.
The rebirth task "Befriend a Kami" now reads "Have a Kami Lv 50".
Assorted fixes and polish.
Auto-Train: a slight finger slip no longer cancels the hold to toggle it, and it now buzzes as it charges.
You can now tap the golden and insight wisps with a second finger while holding to tap.
Rank 9 expedition Ki now scales with the rarity of the outcome.
Faster Market cooking times across all recipes.
Retinue upgrade prices rebalanced.
Hall of Records: faster loading, your own rank always shown, and live online status.
Assorted UI polish and fixes.
Endless Discipline: a new blessing at the Death Shrine. Hold any Train button for five seconds to set that skill to Auto - it trains itself from then on, even while you are away.
Izanagi Tears now count the Ki you generate in a life, not the Ki left in your bank. Spending no longer costs you tears.
The Deity Kami Offering now scales with your power: 5T Ki, or thirty seconds of your combined Ki rate, whichever is greater.
Job pay re-tuned at high levels - the mid and upper jobs grow more gently per level, so the earlier work stays worth doing.
The Market now shows your full repeating rotation while the chefs are looping, including any dish waiting on ingredients - and any dish can be dropped from it.
Mission map markers gained Embark, Cancel, Auto and Collect - the mission window is no longer a detour.
Assorted fixes and clearer wording.
Update reliability improvements.
Smoother launch and update handling.
Test update - confirms over-the-air delta updates are working.
Initial closed beta build.
